rationale: Hard pass. The archetype is anime IP fan-art (Goku Dragon Fist) with deep gold/indigo/purple tones and a power-fantasy beat — none of which maps to Color Road's minimalist pastel runner aesthetic, color-matching loop, or all-ages casual audience. Beyond the stylistic mismatch, using DBZ likeness creates clear IP/legal risk and would mislead installers, tanking retention. Skip unless rebuilt from scratch as an abstract "satisfying ball smash" beat using the game's own palette.
